positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a cosmic mountain range under a nebula-filled sky. The mountain peaks are sharp, clean silhouettes of geometric, ancient rock formations, contrasting vividly against swirling galactic colors—deep violets, brilliant cyan, and ethereal gold dust. Interspersed among the peaks are glowing constellations rendered as delicate linework. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable, featuring strong negative space around the subject matter. Clean vector art aesthetic, maximal contrast, deep space photography meets simplified etching style, suitable for apparel print, flat graphic design, high contrast, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, smudge, signature, logos, writing, grainy, dirty, photorealistic, hyperdetailed
